words.def: United States slapstick comedian who played the pompous and overbearing member of the Laurel and Hardy duo who made many films (1892-1957)
words.zh: a. 難的, 艱苦的, 堅硬的, 勇敢的

words.def: not easy; requiring great physical or mental effort to accomplish or comprehend or endure
words.zh: a. 堅硬的, 硬的, 難的, 艱苦的, 困難的, 堅固的, 猛烈的, 艱難的, 結實的, 確實的

words.def: time for Earth to make a complete rotation on its axis
words.zh: n. 天, 日子, 白天, 工作日

words.def: have or possess, either in a concrete or an abstract sense
